NAVAREA XIX 112/17
1.BARENTS SEA
MISSILE AND ARTILLERY FIRING 18 TO 21 SEP 0100 TO 1900 UTC
NAVIGATION PROHIBITED IN TERRITORIAL WATERS
DANGEROUS OUTSIDE IN AREA BOUNDED BY
A. 73-20.0N 033-40.0E
B. 72-10.0N 037-10.0E
C. 71-30.0N 043-30.0E
D. 69-00.0N 043-30.0E

H. 69-20.2N 034-24.2E THEN COASTAL LINE TO 69-20.5N 033-58.0E
I. 69-35.0N 032-57.5E THEN COASTAL LINE TO 69-44.7N 033-04.8E
